items.headline: US chip stocks gain after Apple-Intel partnership
items.summary: Investing.com -- Shares of U.S. semiconductor companies climbed in premarket trading Thursday after President Trump said Apple has agreed to work with Intel to design and manufacture its chips domestically.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Launches SENZ With Qualcomm And EssilorLuxottica For AI Eyewear
items.summary: Applied Materials has launched SENZ, an integrated ambient visual system for AI-powered smart eyewear. The platform was co-developed with EssilorLuxottica, GlobalFoundries, and Qualcomm to support next generation AR glasses. The announcement signals an expansion of Applied Materials' role beyond semiconductor equipment into consumer optical technologies. Applied Materials (NasdaqGS:AMAT) is drawing fresh attention as it moves into AI-powered smart eyewear with the SENZ platform, while its...
